mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, avatar, user_type, student_no, teacher_no, dept_name, class_id, status, remark, create_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{userType}, #{studentNo}, #{teacherNo}, #{deptName}, #{classId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
